errors.addProjectFirst: Add a project or workspace folder before creating a local copy.
errors.projectCouldNotBeAnalyzed: The project could not be analyzed.
errors.changeCouldNotBeApplied: The change could not be applied.
errors.versionCouldNotBeTrusted: This version could not be trusted.
errors.couldNotAddFolder: Could not add the selected folder.
errors.skillCouldNotBeRestored: The skill could not be restored.
errors.runScan: Run another scan to inspect your local skills.

notices.quarantined: Skill quarantined and retained in the local archive.
notices.localizeCopied: {{name}} copied to {{destination}}. Verify it, then quarantine the global copy if it is no longer needed.
notices.localizeMoved: {{name}} moved to {{destination}} and the global copy was retained in the local archive.
notices.installVerified: {{skillId}} installed and verified against the curated list{{copiesSuffix}}.
notices.trusted: This exact content hash is now trusted locally. A changed copy will no longer inherit that trust.
notices.reputationChecked: Online reputation checked for {{name}}. The result only covers the matching local SHA-256.
notices.foldersAlreadyAdded: Those folders are already part of this workspace.
notices.foldersAdded_one: Added {{count}} project folder and scanned nested scopes.
notices.foldersAdded_other: Added {{count}} project folders and scanned nested scopes.
notices.skillRestored: Skill restored to its original location.

app.demoBanner: Demo mode — you're seeing example data, not your real skills.

common.rollback: Roll back every new copy if one target fails

health.noFindingsExactCopy: ✓ No local findings for this exact copy.
health.noStructuralIssues: No structural issues were found in the scanned skills.
health.overlap_one: {{count}} skill overlaps across scopes or content
health.overlap_other: {{count}} skills overlap across scopes or content
health.footprintDescription: Estimate based on scanned SKILL.md files. Project-local installation limits discovery to relevant workspaces, but this is not a billable-token measurement.
health.heroDescription: Inventory global and folder-scoped installations, find risky or divergent copies, and deploy the smallest configuration each project needs.

projects.title: A skill lives inside a project.
projects.description: Every folder you add is scanned for local Codex and Claude Code skills. Open a project to see exactly what it has and what it is missing.
projects.demoHint: Demo mode: these projects are example data.
projects.noSkillsYet: This project has no skills yet.
projects.noProjectsDetail: Add a folder that contains Codex or Claude Code skills to get started.
projects.globalIntro: These live in ~/.claude/skills or ~/.agents/skills, so every agent loads them in every project. Keep only skills that are genuinely universal — move the rest into the project that actually uses them, or quarantine what you no longer need.
projects.moveToProjectTitle: Copy into a project folder, then quarantine the global copy
projects.noGlobalSkills: No skills installed globally — everything is scoped to a project. That is the recommended setup.

projectDetail.matchingDetection: Matching against the curated detection map
projectDetail.noTechnology: No known technology detected in this folder
projectDetail.noSkillsTitle: This project has no skills yet
projectDetail.noSkillsDetail: Install a local skill, or convert a global copy into a local one from the section below.
projectDetail.globalCopies: Global copies that also apply here
projectDetail.globalCopiesDescription: These skills are installed globally (~/.claude/skills or ~/.agents/skills), so agents also see them while working in this project. Convert them to local to scope them to this folder.
projectDetail.noKnownTechnology: No known technology was detected in this project.
projectDetail.installVerifiedTitle: Install from the curated list with hash verification

map.title: Where every skill is active.
map.description: Local copies limit a skill to the repository or folder that needs it. Same-name copies can coexist or resolve differently by agent, so Skill Control shows every physical installation instead of assuming one universal precedence rule.
map.globalNote: Skills installed in the global scopes (~/.claude/skills, ~/.agents/skills). These apply to every project on this machine.
map.projectNote: Everything an agent sees while working in {{name}} — local copies in this folder plus the global installs that also apply.
map.noSkillsInFolder: No skills are installed in this folder yet.

discover.title: Small, reviewed skill packs.
discover.description: Every entry has a known source, an explicit purpose, and a limited context footprint. No open marketplace noise.
discover.tryDifferent: Try a different term or clear the search.
discover.trustDescription: Each skill is reviewed for structure, scope, scripts and documented compatibility before it appears here.

healthPage.title: Fix what can affect your agents.
healthPage.description: These checks are deterministic and local. They never execute a skill or upload its contents.
healthPage.noFindingsDetail: The scanned skills meet the current structural checks.

inspector.copyInstallation: Copy the {{agent}} installation into a project
inspector.addProjectSource: Add a project folder first and keep a global source available
inspector.localScan: Local deterministic scan · no scripts executed
inspector.hashDivergence: Installed copies do not share one hash
inspector.contextDescription: The estimate is based on SKILL.md. Project scope reduces where a skill is discoverable; actual loading behavior still depends on the agent.
inspector.notChecked: Not checked · only the source identifier and local SHA-256 are sent.
inspector.hashMatches: Audit hash matches this installed copy.
inspector.hashNotCovered: Audit found another content hash; this copy is not covered.
inspector.noAuditedHash: No audited content hash was returned.
inspector.compareAudit: Compare this exact local SHA-256 with skills.sh audits
inspector.addProvenance: Add source repository provenance before checking online

change.curatedDescription: Curated skill from the MafiaIA Skill List.
change.pinnedCommit: • From the curated list, pinned to an exact commit of
change.verifiedBeforeWrite: • Content is downloaded and its SHA-256 verified before anything is written
change.projectScopeDescription: Project scope is recommended: the skill stays available to agents working in this folder without affecting unrelated projects.
change.copyDescription: Copy the complete skill folder into a project for the same agent. The source stays untouched so you can verify the local copy before disabling the global one.
change.moveDescription: Copy the complete skill folder into a project, then remove the global copy after the destination is verified.
change.removeGlobalAfterCopy: Uninstall the global copy after copying successfully

console.creatingBackup: Creating reversible backup in the local archive
console.movingCopy: Moving the copy out of the agent load path
console.confirmingClean: Confirming the original location is clean
console.resolvingListed: Resolving in the MafiaIA Skill List · pinned commit
console.verifyingHash: Verifying SHA-256 against the curated hash
